conflicts.description: The previous continuity sheet placed Leela's move to Mina in chapter 15, but the manuscript sends her to Mina immediately after the chapter 14 viral school presentation and chapter 15 opens with her already gone from the apartment.
conflicts.canonical_value: Leela moves to Mina Rao at the end of chapter 14, taking the red notebook and school badge with her.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 15 depends on Leela already being out of the apartment, so the chapter 14 handoff is the more causally embedded version and the sheet was updated to match it.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet merged Leela's move to Mina with her refusal of the showcase in chapter 16, but the manuscript separates those beats: the move happens in chapter 14 fallout, while chapter 16 is the explicit refusal to let strangers use her room and to participate.
conflicts.canonical_value: Chapter 14 records the move to Mina; chapter 16 records Leela saying no to strangers in her room and refusing showcase participation.
conflicts.resolution_note: Keeping the move and the refusal as separate events preserves the manuscript's causal sequence across the viral fallout and showcase-prep chapters.
